prompt:
A single aquarium pH test strip held with tweezers above a small sample cup of tank water, showing fresh color changes on the reagent pads. In the background, a simple color-reference chart is present but intentionally out of focus and unreadable; the strip is the focal point, implying the result was matched quickly within the dipping window.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a clean near-future aquarium maintenance setting: soft cinematic lighting, realistic paper-fiber strip texture, no brand logos, and no readable text. If hands appear, show only gloved fingers or partial hands; keep the strip centered and unambiguous.
